title: Extra Large Rat Traps That Kill Instantly, Super Heavy Duty Humane Mouse Traps for Indoors and Outdoors, Squirrel Trap with High Capture Rate Safe for Family and Pets(2PCS)
features: 【Higher capture rate】Our rat trap has built-in stronger spring, which is more effective than the traditional mouse trap. Larger size and thicker spring, increased capture rate by 30%.

【Extra large design】Unlike those teeny weeny little trap, the large black trap is 14cm long and 7.5cm wide which makes them the larger sized rat traps available on the market. Whether a rat, mouse, or voles, it can easily catch them.

【Easy to use & versatile】Our humane mouse traps is easy to use, as long as putting the bait into the attractant cup and lock the metal strip on the back seat. Then put the rat killer near the corner waiting for the mouse to be caught. The traps can be placed at several indoors and outdoors.
【Reusable】just wash The rodent trap with water & dry it. So they are can be reused for multiple catches throughout the seasons, cost-effective and save money!
【Environmental friendly & quality assurance】Our new upgrade mouse traps perform better than wooden traps, electric mouse traps, glue sticky pads, mouse repellent.
description: Product Description Are you tired of dealing with rats breaking into your kitchen, garden, garage ? These large size mouse traps for indoors and outdoors can kill rat quickly and effectively before the bait is stolen. Extra Large Design Unlike those teeny weeny little trap, the large black trap is 14cm long and 7.5cm wide which makes them the larger sized rat traps available on the market. Sensitive Pedal Sensitive Pedal and new ABS plastic make the strength and sensitivity of the mouse traps are at least 20% higher. Powerful Spring Made of stronger stainless steel Our upgrade large size mouse traps more effective 1. Teeth or claw style traps cause lots of blood and often maim their targets without actually causing death. 2. Wooden snap traps aren’t strong enough to kill large mice instantly and often snap inconsistently, which leads to stolen bait or handler injury when trying to set the trap. 3. The electric rat trap is expensive and a potential fire hazard. Plus, rodents quickly learn to avoid them. 4. Mouse sticky pads or mouse glue trap are unethical and lead to a slow and painful death and get incredibly dirty and smelly really fast. HOW IT WORKS? 1.Put the bait into the bait cup, peanut butter, chocolate and bread are better choice. 2.Set humane mouse/ rat traps by pulling down bar with both hands until you hear a “click”. 3.Please position the rodent traps at right angles to wall, with the baits facing the wall. TIPS 1. Please place these traps near walls or corners, position them at right angle with the bait cup facing the wall to decrease the possibility of mice escaping. 2. Please change the bait frequently to keep it fresh and attractive. 3. Mice are very alert to new things, so they won't be easily trapped. Please wait patiently until these traps work. 4.Do not touch the pedal of the mouse trap with your fingers after setting to avoid crush. Please keep it away from children, pets and non-target animals, the force can be sharp. PRODUCTS INCLUDE 2* Large Size Mouse trap 1*Instructions Use Effect Display
